en: "Thus says the Lord GOD: The gate of the inner court that faces east shall be shut on the six working days, but on the Sabbath day it shall be opened, and on the day of the new moon it shall be opened.
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：“內院朝東的門，在工作的六天裡，必須關閉，在安息日卻要打開，在月朔之日也要打開。

en: The prince shall enter by the vestibule of the gate from outside, and shall take his stand by the post of the gate. The priests shall offer his burnt offering and his peace offerings, and he shall worship at the threshold of the gate. Then he shall go out, but the gate shall not be shut until evening.
zh: 君王要從外面經這門的門廊進入，站在門框旁邊。祭司們要為他預備燔祭和平安祭。他要在門檻那裡敬拜，然後出去。這門不可關閉，直到晚上。

en: The people of the land shall bow down at the entrance of that gate before the LORD on the Sabbaths and on the new moons.
zh: 每逢安息日和月朔，國中的人民要在這門口，在耶和華面前敬拜。

en: The burnt offering that the prince offers to the LORD on the Sabbath day shall be six lambs without blemish and a ram without blemish.
zh: 君王在安息日所獻給耶和華的燔祭，是六隻無殘疾的羊羔和一隻無殘疾的公綿羊。

en: And the grain offering with the ram shall be an ephah, and the grain offering with the lambs shall be as much as he is able, together with a hin of oil to each ephah.
zh: 所獻的素祭是這樣：公綿羊要與十七公升細麵一同獻上，他要按著自己的能力，隨同那些羊羔獻上若干份細麵，但每份細麵加油三公升。

en: On the day of the new moon he shall offer a bull from the herd without blemish, and six lambs and a ram, which shall be without blemish.
zh: 他要在月朔獻一頭無殘疾的公牛犢、六隻羊羔和一隻公綿羊，都是無殘疾的。

en: As a grain offering he shall provide an ephah with the bull and an ephah with the ram, and with the lambs as much as he is able, together with a hin of oil to each ephah.
zh: 他要預備素祭，公牛要與十七公升細麵一同獻上，公綿羊要與十七公升細麵一同獻上，他要按著自己的能力，隨同那些羊羔獻上若干份細麵，但每份細麵加油三公升。

en: When the prince enters, he shall enter by the vestibule of the gate, and he shall go out by the same way.
zh: 君王進入的時候，要經這門的門廊進入，也要從原路出去。

en: "When the people of the land come before the LORD at the appointed feasts, he who enters by the north gate to worship shall go out by the south gate, and he who enters by the south gate shall go out by the north gate: no one shall return by way of the gate by which he entered, but each shall go out straight ahead.
zh: “在各指定的節日中，國中的人民來朝見耶和華的時候，那從北門進來敬拜的，要從南門出去；那從南門進來的，要從北門出去；誰也不可從他進來的門回去，卻要從對面的門出去。

en: When they enter, the prince shall enter with them, and when they go out, he shall go out.
zh: 君王要在人民當中，人民進入的時候，他也進入；人民出去的時候，他也出去。

en: "At the feasts and the appointed festivals, the grain offering with a young bull shall be an ephah, and with a ram an ephah, and with the lambs as much as one is able to give, together with a hin of oil to an ephah.
zh: 在節期和指定的節日中，所獻的素祭是這樣：每一頭公牛要與十七公升細麵一同獻上，每一隻公綿羊要與十七公升細麵一同獻上，每一隻羊羔要按著他的能力，與細麵一同獻上，每份十七公升的細麵加油三公升。

en: When the prince provides a freewill offering, either a burnt offering or peace offerings as a freewill offering to the LORD, the gate facing east shall be opened for him. And he shall offer his burnt offering or his peace offerings as he does on the Sabbath day. Then he shall go out, and after he has gone out the gate shall be shut.
zh: 君王把甘心獻的燔祭或平安祭獻給耶和華的時候，朝東的門要為他打開。他就獻上他的燔祭和平安祭，正如他在安息日所獻上的一樣。他獻完了就出去；他出去以後，門就要關上。

en: "You shall provide a lamb a year old without blemish for a burnt offering to the LORD daily; morning by morning you shall provide it.
zh: “每天你要預備一隻一歲無殘疾的羊羔，獻給耶和華作燔祭，每天早晨都要獻上。

en: And you shall provide a grain offering with it morning by morning, one sixth of an ephah, and one third of a hin of oil to moisten the flour, as a grain offering to the LORD. This is a perpetual statute.
zh: 每天早晨也要預備同獻的素祭，細麵兩公斤，並調和細麵所用的油一公升，作常獻給耶和華的素祭，這是永遠的定例。

en: Thus the lamb and the meal offering and the oil shall be provided, morning by morning, for a regular burnt offering.
zh: 所以每天早晨要這樣預備羊羔、素祭和油，作常獻的燔祭。”

en: "Thus says the Lord GOD: If the prince makes a gift to any of his sons as his inheritance, it shall belong to his sons. It is their property by inheritance.
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：“君王如果把自己一部分的產業作禮物賜給他的一個兒子，這產業就要歸給他的子孫；那是他們所承受的基業。

en: But if he makes a gift out of his inheritance to one of his servants, it shall be his to the year of liberty. Then it shall revert to the prince; surely it is his inheritance- it shall belong to his sons.
zh: 君王如把自己的一部分產業作禮物賜給他的一個臣僕，這產業就要歸給那臣僕直到自由之年，然後要歸還給君王。君王的產業，至終只可歸兒子所有。

en: The prince shall not take any of the inheritance of the people, thrusting them out of their property. He shall give his sons their inheritance out of his own property, so that none of my people shall be scattered from his property."
zh: 君王不可奪取人民的產業，把他們趕離他們的基業。他要從自己的基業中把產業賜給自己的兒子，免得我的子民因被趕離自己的基業而四散。”

en: Then he brought me through the entrance, which was at the side of the gate, to the north row of the holy chambers for the priests, and behold, a place was there at the extreme western end of them.
zh: 那帶領我的，領我從門旁的入口，進到那些朝向北面，供祭司使用，聖潔的房子。在西邊的盡頭有一塊地方。

en: And he said to me, "This is the place where the priests shall boil the guilt offering and the sin offering, and where they shall bake the grain offering, in order not to bring them out into the outer court and so communicate holiness to the people."
zh: 他對我說：“這就是祭司煮贖愆祭牲和贖罪祭牲，以及烤素祭的地方，免得祭物帶出外院，使人民成聖。”

en: Then he brought me out to the outer court and led me around to the four corners of the court. And behold, in each corner of the court there was another court-
zh: 他又領我出到外院，使我經過院子的四個角落；院子的每個角落都有一個小院子。

en: in the four corners of the court were small courts, forty cubits long and thirty broad; the four were of the same size.
zh: 院子四個角落的小 院子，每個長二十公尺，寬十五公尺；四個角落的院子，大小都是一樣。

en: On the inside, around each of the four courts was a row of masonry, with hearths made at the bottom of the rows all around.
zh: 在四個小院子裡面，每個四邊都有一排石牆；在這四排石牆下面，都有爐灶。

en: Then he said to me, "These are the kitchens where those who minister at the temple shall boil the sacrifices of the people."
zh: 他對我說：“這些都是廚房，在聖殿裡供職的要在這裡煮人民的祭物。”
